evaluator: fresh independent full-epic Level 2 evaluator (after all slices merge)
approval_notes: Orchestrator-directed F005 Slice 1. Build ONE slice, open ONE PR, do NOT merge, do NOT flip any passes flag. F005 stays passes:false; a separate fresh-context full-epic Level 2 close-out owns the flip after all slices merge.

Owner-confirmed decisions carried in: Q1 OFFLINE deterministic extraction against captured official Cloudflare FIXTURES (LiveFetcher gated OFF in CI); first target = Cloudflare Workers + Pages free-tier limits on developers.cloudflare.com (REAL Cloudflare free facts, official evidence, NOT the synthetic 'example' provider). Q3 publication confidence lives in OfferVersion.material_facts JSONB in S2, NOT this slice, and NO confidence migration ever. Q4 auto-publish is S2, NOT this slice.

Standing autonomy boundaries: may branch/implement/test/commit/push/open ONE PR; may NOT merge, flip any passes flag, add a Python/npm dependency, weaken any existing test/fixture/CHECK/trigger, touch trg_offer_version_immutable or the two 0006 separation triggers, or add any publication/OfferVersion path.
objective: Deliver a genuinely-working Cloudflare OFFICIAL free-tier extraction vertical slice, end-to-end and offline: (1) deterministic quota/limit extraction from captured official Cloudflare fixtures for Workers + Pages free-tier, reusing the existing SourceAdapter contract + generic HTML table-walking machinery via provider-specific extraction profiles registered as data; (2) an idempotent config->DB sync that turns the Cloudflare provider config into Provider + Source rows, bridging the planner-identified field gaps (type->adapter_type, url->endpoint, extraction_profile->parser_profile, schedule_ref->schedule, YAML source id->Source.slug); (3) a reversible additive migration 0007 adding Source.slug as the stable idempotent-sync key; (4) a scan runner (run_provider_scans) wired as an invocable runtime entrypoint that drives run_scan + reconcile_scan across configured providers using an offline fetcher, producing Candidate + official Evidence only. NO publication path, NO Offer/OfferVersion/Quota writes; evidence.offer_version_id stays NULL. 'unknown is better than guessed' - no number is invented that is not present in the fixture.
scope: apps/api/app/ingest/adapters/html.py: add two provider-specific HtmlExtractionProfile entries to HTML_EXTRACTION_PROFILES - cloudflare_workers_limits (table id 'workers-free-tier') and cloudflare_pages_limits (table id 'pages-free-tier') - mapping the free-tier columns to fact fields (service, offer_type, requires_card bool, has_paid_dependencies bool, plus per-limit text fields captured verbatim). Provider knowledge lives as data in the registry; no adapter code branches on provider.

tests/fixtures/ingest/cloudflare/html/workers-limits/{source.html,expected.json} and .../pages-limits/{source.html,expected.json}: captured representative official snapshots carrying REAL Cloudflare free-tier facts, keyed by the official developers.cloudflare.com URLs, with expected CandidateFacts + content-hash-stable extraction.

apps/api/app/ingest/config_sync.py (new): sync_provider(session, ProviderConfig) upserting one Provider (by slug) and its Sources (by Source.slug), bridging YAML->DB fields; returns a summary of created/updated/unchanged. Idempotent: a second run on the same config creates no duplicates and reports zero changes. Pure ORM; no network, no publication path.

apps/api/app/ingest/runner.py (new): run_provider_scans(session, config_or_provider, fetcher, *, reconcile=True) that, per enabled source, guards build_adapter+run_scan in try/except (a build/scan fault is recorded as a per-source error, never crashes the run) and optionally runs reconcile_scan; returns a per-source result summary. Plus a `python -m app.ingest.runner` CLI entrypoint: default OfflineFetcher (no egress), optional --fixtures DIR to build a FixtureFetcher from captured fixtures, --database-url/DATABASE_URL for the session. No Offer/OfferVersion/Quota writes.

migrations/versions/0007_source_slug.py (revision 0007_source_slug, down_revision 0006_quarantine_separation): additive + reversible. Upgrade adds source.slug (Text, nullable) + UniqueConstraint uq_source_slug; downgrade drops the constraint + column only. Touches no other table/column/constraint; does not touch trg_offer_version_immutable, trg_candidate_official_source, or trg_evidence_official_candidate.
apps/api/app/models/domain.py: add slug mapped_column(Text, nullable=True) + UniqueConstraint('slug', name='uq_source_slug') to Source so compare_metadata drift stays []. No other model change.
apps/api/app/ingest/__init__.py: export the new Cloudflare profile names/helpers, sync_provider, and run_provider_scans.

config/examples/providers/cloudflare.example.yaml: repoint cloudflare-pages-limits to extraction_profile cloudflare_pages_limits and add cloudflare-workers-limits (html, official, workers limits URL, cloudflare_workers_limits). Existing rss/mcp/pricing sources left intact.

tests/unit: test_adapter_html_cloudflare.py (deterministic Cloudflare extraction: identical fixture -> identical CandidateFacts + identical content hash; real facts; unknown-not-guessed on a missing column) and test_ingest_config_sync.py + test_ingest_runner.py (config-sync bridging + idempotency without a DB using a fake/in-memory session where feasible; runner per-source build-failure guard).

tests/integration/test_ingest_config_sync.py + test_ingest_runner.py (live PG): config->DB sync creates Provider+Sources and is idempotent on re-run (no duplicate rows, zero spurious changes); runner over the Cloudflare config with a FixtureFetcher produces Candidate + official Evidence for Workers+Pages, writes ZERO offer/offer_version/quota, evidence.offer_version_id IS NULL; migration 0007 up->down->up leaves compare_metadata drift == [] with all triggers intact.
scripts/stack-smoke.ps1 + scripts/stack-smoke.sh: add a 'source.slug present (0007)' check.
docs: note migration 0007 (Source.slug) in docs/DATA_MODEL.md and the Cloudflare extraction profile + config->DB sync + scan runner in docs/PROVIDER_ADAPTERS.md / docs/SOURCE_REUSE_AND_PROVENANCE.md.
out_of_scope: Any publication path: creating or mutating offer/offer_version/quota, or auto-publish (S2). evidence.offer_version_id stays NULL; trg_offer_version_immutable untouched.
Publication confidence storage / any confidence migration (S2 lives in OfferVersion.material_facts JSONB; never a migration).
LiveFetcher / real network egress in CI (LiveFetcher stays OFF by default; extraction runs against captured fixtures).
Weakening the community/official separation: the two 0006 triggers and trust gating are untouched; Cloudflare sources are official -> Evidence only.
Any new Python or npm dependency; no pyproject/requirements*/package.json change (requirements-sync guard stays green; stdlib only).
Wiring ingestion into the worker/scheduler/API HTTP runtime beyond the runner CLI entrypoint.
Marking F005 passes:true (reserved for the separate post-merge full-epic Level 2 close-out).
acceptance_criteria: Deterministic official extraction: the Cloudflare Workers and Pages fixtures each extract the expected CandidateFacts with real free-tier values (no invented numbers); re-extracting the byte-identical fixture yields identical CandidateFacts and an identical content hash (idempotent, reproducible). A missing column yields UNKNOWN (None), never a guess.

Config->DB sync is idempotent: sync_provider on the Cloudflare config creates one Provider and its Sources (fields correctly bridged: type->adapter_type, url->endpoint, extraction_profile->parser_profile, schedule_ref->schedule, YAML id->Source.slug); a second run creates no duplicate rows and reports zero changes (stable on Source.slug).

Migration 0007 is additive + reversible: source.slug + uq_source_slug exist after up and are gone after down; up->down->up leaves compare_metadata drift == []; trg_offer_version_immutable and the two 0006 separation triggers survive throughout.

Scan runner works offline and is invocable: run_provider_scans drives run_scan + reconcile_scan across the configured Cloudflare sources with a FixtureFetcher, producing Candidate + official Evidence for Workers+Pages; a per-source build/scan fault is isolated as a per-source error (the run never crashes). A `python -m app.ingest.runner` entrypoint exists (default OfflineFetcher, no egress).
No publication path: the runner writes ZERO offer, offer_version, and quota rows; every Evidence row has offer_version_id IS NULL; trg_offer_version_immutable is untouched.
Separation intact: Cloudflare sources are official and produce Evidence; the 0006 separation triggers and trust gating are unchanged; no community source acquires evidence.
Network seam only: extraction reaches bytes solely through the Fetcher seam (FixtureFetcher/OfflineFetcher offline); no adapter imports urllib/httpx/requests; LiveFetcher stays disabled by default.
Supply chain: no new Python or npm dependency; requirements-sync guard stays green; stdlib only.
Regression green: scripts/test.ps1 and scripts/check.ps1 -NodeAudit pass offline (ruff lint+format, pytest, prettier, eslint, detect-secrets, pip-audit, npm audit, requirements-sync).
F005 remains passes:false; a fresh-context independent full-epic Level 2 evaluator (post all-slices merge) owns any status change.

integration_commands: Required: Slice 1 adds migration 0007. Fresh live DB cycle on alternate host ports (POSTGRES_PORT=55432, API_PORT=8010, WEB_PORT=8090, DATABASE_URL=postgresql+psycopg://atlas:atlas@localhost:55432/atlas): docker compose down --volumes -> stack-up --build (fresh DB applies 0001-0007) -> scripts/stack-smoke.ps1 -> pytest tests/integration (config_sync + runner + domain_migration + ingest_scan/reconcile/separation) with DATABASE_URL set -> docker compose down --volumes.

Prove config->DB sync idempotency (re-run => zero changes, no duplicate rows), deterministic extraction (Candidate + official Evidence for Workers+Pages, evidence.offer_version_id NULL, zero offer/offer_version/quota), and migration 0007 up->down->up with compare_metadata drift == [] and all triggers intact.

risks.data_migration: Migration 0007 adds one nullable Text column (source.slug) + one UNIQUE constraint; additive and reversible, downgrade drops exactly those. Nullable + Postgres NULL-distinct uniqueness means pre-existing/unsynced source rows are unaffected. ORM Source gains the matching slug column + UniqueConstraint so compare_metadata drift stays []. No other 0001-0006 object is touched.
risks.security_privacy: Extraction is offline against captured fixtures via the Fetcher seam; LiveFetcher stays OFF. No user-controlled URLs (endpoints come from vetted config only). No secrets in fixtures/config/tests. Official Cloudflare sources produce Evidence; separation triggers unchanged.
risks.portability: Pure standard-library Python; PL/pgSQL only in the additive migration; no new dependency; amd64/arm64 unaffected.
risks.zero_cost_safety: No offer/offer_version/quota is written and no free/Z0 claim is published in this slice; extraction produces pre-publication Candidate + Evidence only. Cloudflare free-tier facts are captured verbatim from official docs with evidence provenance; unknown-is-better-than-guessed enforced (missing column -> None).
risks.regression: run_scan/reconcile logic is unchanged; the runner composes the existing functions with a per-source guard. Existing HTML profiles and fixtures are untouched (new profiles are additive registry entries).
risks.supply_chain: No new Python or npm dependency; requirements-sync guard stays green; stdlib + PL/pgSQL only.

notes: Orchestrator directed F005 Slice 1, then STOP for a fresh-context full-epic Level 2 evaluation. Do NOT flip passes; do NOT merge; do NOT add a publication path.
